---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new module, improvement, or idea
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
Describe the feature or improvement.

**Why does it matter?**
The problem it solves or the workflow it improves.

**Module concerned**
Existing module, or a brand-new one?

**Anything else?**
Mockups, examples from other tools, links — anything helps.
